mapper.select: SELECT variant_id as "id", product_id as "productId", variant_name as "variantName", sku as "sku", ean as "ean", mrp as "mrp", selling_price as "sellingPrice", available_qty as "availableQty", reserved_qty as "reservedQty", inbound_qty as "inboundQty", variant_status as "status" FROM hm_query.product_variant_flat WHERE product_id = #{id} ORDER BY sku

SELECT product_id as "id", product_name as "name", description as "description", short_description as "shortDescription", brand as "brand", category_id as "categoryId", category_name as "categoryName", slug as "slug", product_status as "stateId", base_price as "basePrice", hsn_code as "hsnCode", country_of_origin as "countryOfOrigin", weight_grams as "weightGrams", warranty_months as "warrantyMonths", is_returnable as "isReturnable", return_window_days as "returnWindowDays", created_date as "createdTime" FROM hm_query.product_catalog_flat WHERE slug = #{slug} AND product_status = 'PUBLISHED'

SELECT count(*) FROM hm_query.product_catalog_flat WHERE product_status = 'PUBLISHED' AND (product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR brand LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%'))

SELECT product_id as "id", product_name as "name", brand as "brand", category_name as "categoryName", slug as "slug", product_status as "stateId", base_price as "basePrice", avg_rating as "avgRating", review_count as "reviewCount", seller_name as "sellerName" FROM hm_query.product_catalog_flat WHERE product_status = 'PUBLISHED' AND (product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR brand LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%')) ${orderby} ${pagination}
SELECT count(*) FROM hm_query.product_catalog_flat WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND product_status = 'PUBLISHED'

SELECT product_id as "id", product_name as "name", brand as "brand", slug as "slug", base_price as "basePrice", avg_rating as "avgRating", review_count as "reviewCount", stock_status as "stockStatus", seller_name as "sellerName" FROM hm_query.product_catalog_flat WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND product_status = 'PUBLISHED' ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT category_id as "id", name as "name", slug as "slug", parent_id as "parentId", depth as "depth", active as "active", product_count as "productCount" FROM hm_query.category_config_flat WHERE active = true ORDER BY depth, display_order, name

SELECT product_id as "id", product_name as "name", description as "description", short_description as "shortDescription", brand as "brand", category_id as "categoryId", category_name as "categoryName", slug as "slug", product_status as "stateId", base_price as "basePrice", hsn_code as "hsnCode", country_of_origin as "countryOfOrigin", weight_grams as "weightGrams", warranty_months as "warrantyMonths", is_returnable as "isReturnable", return_window_days as "returnWindowDays", created_date as "createdTime", primary_sku as "sku", variant_count as "variantCount", total_available_qty as "availableQty", total_reserved_qty as "reservedQty", stock_status as "stockStatus", seller_id as "sellerId", seller_name as "sellerName", seller_tier as "sellerTier", avg_rating as "avgRating", review_count as "reviewCount", rating_5_pct as "rating5Pct", rating_4_pct as "rating4Pct", rating_3_pct as "rating3Pct", rating_2_pct as "rating2Pct", rating_1_pct as "rating1Pct", sentiment_positive_pct as "sentimentPositivePct", sentiment_neutral_pct as "sentimentNeutralPct", sentiment_negative_pct as "sentimentNegativePct", units_sold_30d as "unitsSold30d", revenue_30d as "revenue30d", conversion_rate as "conversionRate", return_rate as "returnRate", views_30d as "views30d", violations_count as "violationsCount" FROM hm_query.product_catalog_flat WHERE product_id = #{id}
SELECT product_status as "stateId", COUNT(*) as "count" FROM hm_query.product_catalog_flat GROUP BY product_status

SELECT variant_id as "id", product_id as "productId", variant_name as "variantName", sku as "sku", ean as "ean", mrp as "mrp", selling_price as "sellingPrice", available_qty as "availableQty", reserved_qty as "reservedQty", inbound_qty as "inboundQty", variant_status as "status", attributes_json as "attributesJson" FROM hm_query.product_variant_flat WHERE product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY sku

SELECT variant_id as "id", product_id as "productId", sku as "sku", selling_price as "sellingPrice", available_qty as "availableQty", variant_status as "status" FROM hm_query.product_variant_flat WHERE sku = #{sku}

SELECT avg_product_rating as "avgCategoryRating", avg_views_per_product as "avgCategoryViews", conversion_rate as "avgCategoryConversion", return_rate as "avgCategoryReturnRate" FROM hm_query.category_performance_daily WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} ORDER BY summary_date DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT available_qty as "availableQty", avg_daily_sales as "avgDailySales", days_of_supply as "daysOfSupply", last_restock_at as "lastRestockAt", last_sale_at as "lastSaleAt", locked_capital as "lockedCapital" FROM hm_query.inventory_health_flat WHERE product_id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT business_name as "businessName", store_name as "storeName", contact_email as "contactEmail", contact_phone as "contactPhone", rating as "rating", avg_lead_time_days as "avgLeadTimeDays", tier as "tier", health_score as "healthScore" FROM hm_query.seller_dashboard_flat WHERE seller_id = #{sellerId}

SELECT product_id as "id", product_name as "name", primary_sku as "sku", base_price as "basePrice", seller_name as "sellerName", avg_rating as "avgRating" FROM hm_query.product_catalog_flat WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND product_id != #{excludeProductId} AND product_status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY units_sold_30d DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT brand_status as "stateId", COUNT(*) as "count" FROM hm_query.brand_registry_flat GROUP BY brand_status

SELECT COUNT(*) as "total", COUNT(CASE WHEN filterable THEN 1 END) as "filterable", COUNT(CASE WHEN searchable THEN 1 END) as "searchable", COUNT(CASE WHEN variation_count > 0 THEN 1 END) as "usedInVariations" FROM hm_query.attribute_definition_flat

SELECT count(*) FROM hm_query.attribute_set_flat
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
SELECT count(*) FROM hm_query.category_config_flat WHERE required_attributes_count > 0 AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')

SELECT ccf.category_id as "categoryId", ccf.name as "categoryName", ccf.required_attributes_json as "requiredAttributesJson", ccf.required_attributes_count as "requiredAttributesCount" FROM hm_query.category_config_flat ccf WHERE ccf.required_attributes_count > 0 AND ccf.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') ${orderby} ${pagination}
